title: fumaria ballii
intro: Fumaria ballii, also known as Ball's fumitory, is a species of flowering plant in the fumitory family that is native to Europe. It is a biennial or annual plant with a slender stem and small, white or yellowish flowers. Fumaria ballii has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing digestive issues.
